patch.value: SDK: bundled extensions use internal imports instead of @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk

Bundled extensions (beads, todos) import from ../../../../src/core/... instead of @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk. While valid for bundled extensions that ship with the package, this sets a bad example for third-party extension authors. Should either provide a starter template using SDK imports or document that bundled extensions intentionally use internal paths.
